subject: GUESS WHAT
body:
after all is said and done --- I woke up early for the flight as  planned 
with Brucie and after  my normal 1st  early   bathroom  visit , felt bouncy off 
the walls a bit.    Just wobbly ,  no pain or even earache .  ( Didn't even 
take normal  meds    lastnight  because all was  packed.  ) 
 My  medical  inner sense  guesses  is it's an imbalance of the spinal fluids 
 bcs. clearly I did not  rest it out yesterday like a jerk  . My fault.
He's on his way  with the original flight arrangements  ----  Has his pick up 
service.  I'm going to try to see how I  feel later tho I don't really feel 
bad  now .     Maybe  I could try to get later  flight or tomorrow and work it 
out because   i'm  disappointed.
My better judgment says I should give this at least a few hours  .  Damn - 
even going to  a good show   , great seats Tuesday  and a restaurant i've been 
wanting to go to for so long .    .ICH
Anyway, still ,
 Need to talk to you if you were willing  about  YOU.  
 
Marcia M.



**************Start the year off right.  Easy ways to stay in shape.     
http://body.aol.com/fitness/winter-exercise?NCID=aolcmp00300000002489
body_html:
after all is said and done --- I woke up early for the flight as planned with Brucie and after  my normal 1st  early   bathroom visit , felt bouncy off the walls a bit.    Just wobbly , no pain or even earache .  ( Didn't even take normal meds    lastnight  because all was packed.  ) 
 My  medical  inner sense  guesses  is it's an imbalance of the spinal fluids  bcs. clearly I did not rest it out yesterday like a jerk  . My fault.
He's on his way  with the original flight arrangements ----  Has his pick up service.  I'm going to try to see how I feel later tho I don't really feel bad now .     Maybe  I could try to get later flight or tomorrow and work it out because   i'm disappointed.
My better judgment says I should give this at least a few hours .  Damn - even going to  a good show   , great seats Tuesday and a restaurant i've been wanting to go to for so long .   .ICH
Anyway, still ,
 Need to talk to you if you were willing  about YOU. 
 
Marcia M.
